## Using components {#using-components}

<InfoBanner title="Important notice" description="This section contains critical information">

The API is transitioning to version 3. Read more about [the migration guide](/docs/migration/).

</InfoBanner>

<ExpandableCard title="What is rate limiting?" contentPreview="Rate limiting controls request frequency">

Rate limiting restricts the number of requests a client can make within a time window.

Every public API should implement rate limiting to prevent abuse.

</ExpandableCard>
